queries.question: List both youth hostels and hotels with rooms that cost 50.
queries.sql:
SELECT hotels.name 
FROM hotels JOIN rooms ON hotels.id = rooms.hotel_id
WHERE (hotels.accommodation_type = "Youth Hostel" OR hotels.accommodation_type = "Hotel") AND rooms.price = 50.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?hotels a :Hotels .
  ?rooms a :Rooms .
  ?rooms p:hashotels ?hotels .
  ?hotels p:name ?name .
  ?hotels p:accommodation_type ?accommodation_type_w .
  ?hotels p:accommodation_type ?accommodation_type_w2 .
  ?rooms p:price ?price_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?accommodation_type_w) = "Youth Hostel" || STR(?accommodation_type_w2) = "Hotel")) && (STR(?price_w) = "50" || STR(?price_w) = "50.0")))
}

queries.sql:
SELECT hotels.name 
FROM hotels JOIN rooms ON hotels.id = rooms.hotel_id
